title: Real-time live dashboard displaying urgency and wait time
description: The system shall provide a live dashboard that updates in real time to display current urgency and wait time values.
rationale: To allow users to prioritize tasks based on the latest urgency and waiting duration data, enhancing operational efficiency and decision-making.
business_value: Improves task prioritization, reducing delays and increasing productivity by allowing quick access to critical information.

source.description: As a user I need a live dashboard that displays urgency and wait time So that I can prioritize tasks based on current urgency and waiting duration

stakeholders: All users who need to prioritize tasks
IT support team responsible for the system's uptime and maintenance
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the live dashboard
When urgency and wait time data are updated
Then the dashboard shows the current urgency and wait time values
postconditions: The dashboard displays the most recent urgency and wait time values
The user can prioritize tasks based on the displayed information
functional_constraints: The dashboard updates in real time
Urgency and wait time data are available from the system

non_functional_requirements.performance: The response time for updating the dashboard should be less than 500ms under normal conditions.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The dashboard must be available at least 99.9% of the time.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system should handle up to 1,000 concurrent users accessing the dashboard without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable; the interface should be intuitive for all users

edge_cases: What happens when there is a network outage affecting data availability?
How does the system handle sudden spikes in data volume?
What if the urgency or wait time data becomes corrupted?
dependencies: Real-time data feed from the underlying system
A reliable backend service to process and store data

interfaces.name: Data Feed API
interfaces.description: The dashboard interacts with this API to fetch real-time urgency and wait time data.

interfaces.name: Live Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: This is the interface where users interact with the live dashboard to view urgency and wait time data.

test_cases.description: Verify that the live dashboard updates in real-time when data feed API provides new values.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard displays updated urgency and wait time values within 500ms.

test_cases.description: Test how the system handles network outages by simulating a lost connection to the data feed API.
test_cases.expected_result: The dashboard shows an error message or maintains old data until it can re-establish the connection.
